alkylation reagent: alkylation by the addition of 55 mM iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: alkylation by the addition of 55 mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: digested in an enzyme mixture (1:1 ratio of 0.25% trypsin to 0.1% collagenase)
collision energy: with a normalized collision energy of 30%
fragmentation method: MS/MS acquisition was performed in the Orbitrap with a 3-s cycle time, a resolution of 15,000 at m/z 200, and an intensity threshold of 50,000.
instrument: connected to an Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer
ionization type: using on-line electrospray tandem mass spectrometry
reduction reagent: treated with 20 mM TCEP for 30 min in darkness
reduction concentration: treated with 20 mM TCEP for 30 min in darkness
